flavorText: Alchemists solve problems with brews, catalysts, restoratives, toxins, and volatile reactions prepared ahead of time.

features.description: Prepare adaptable brews that can heal, enhance movement, steady a mind, or twist the flow of a fight depending on what the party needs.
Your subclass grants a stronger healing, antidote, and condition-management spell package.
Your brews react to the target and situation more cleanly, making them better at stabilizing or empowering allies in motion.
Your laboratory methods become reliable enough to answer poison, disease, collapse, and long-fight attrition with confidence.
Your late-game formulae let you reshape bodies, properties, and battlefield conditions like a true chemical virtuoso.

alchemist-experimental-elixirs.summary: Carry a menu of brews that turn preparation into flexible support.
alchemist-experimental-elixirs.description: Experimental Elixirs are why the subclass exists. You should feel like every rest gives you a fresh set of answers for healing, mobility, resilience, or tactical utility.

alchemist-restorative-spells.summary: Your spell identity leans hard into recovery, cleansing, and adaptive chemistry.

alchemist-adaptive-catalyst.summary: Your formulae become smarter and more responsive once the fight turns chaotic.

alchemist-panacea-kit.summary: You become the party’s premium answer to long-fight attrition and harsh conditions.

alchemist-master-transmutation.summary: Your highest-tier chemistry changes the rules of the encounter instead of just patching around them.
